source_materials_status: No validated active-particle simulation source code is included in this Zenodo-safe checkfix package.

excluded_materials.reason: The included script and figure were a stochastic Optimal Velocity traffic/STT ring-road simulation, not an Active Brownian Particle information-feedback simulation for this manuscript.
The index described a large local environment/source bundle associated with the mismatched uploaded material and is not suitable as active-particle provenance.

integrity_policy: The package is retained as a manuscript companion archive with claim-boundary documents and selected result summaries, not as a complete reproduction-code release.

reconstructed_abp_public_reproducer.basis: manuscript equations and figure diagnostics for ABP information-feedback model
reconstructed_abp_public_reproducer.limitation: not original local ABP exploratory source code
